{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032317042298E4A39E049AD3F26EC9"}"},"total":608},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7430588375260332824","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"赞美无上的神皇，如此忠诚 如此伟大的作品，希望快点更新"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1730075971,"group_id":"7418176551344147480","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"行有不得，反求诸己","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5pMZv0v2dpjSM8T6lanH4SEB+7y2C7617i+2azcsznB","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/74029d9b635c4436aaea5052467e589a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794487&x-signature=QZeL3gyyzjw%2FW2mPZgeyH3TNh9A%3D","user_id":"1410050183137112","user_name":"崂山绿茶."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1410050183137112","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7418176551344147480","book_info":{"abstract":"【斩神+无女主+无敌+轻松】
李铭穿越斩神世界，觉醒金手指，杀敌即可抽奖获得战锤中的武器、科技、战团……
李铭表示这些我都懂，链锯剑、爆弹枪、基因种子就算了。
可是谁能告诉我帝皇和四小贩怎么都变成我的分身了？
那天，黄金王座前的神明持剑而立，庞大的虚影笼罩华夏。
人面鬼？不知道能挡链锯剑几下
难陀蛇妖？我的爆弹枪卡壳了，你到枪口前面帮我看看。
古神教会，开门！审判庭送温暖！
奥林匹斯众神？不知道抗不抗得住原体加军团。
克苏鲁？慈父纳垢、战神恐虐、智者奸奇、美神色孽向你们问好。
李铭：“这位同学，能占用你几分钟吗？我希望给你讲一下群星的唯一、人类的共主、黄金王座上的不朽者——帝皇”
